events.title: A moment.
events.body: You stopped on the walk home for the sunset. Five minutes. Five minutes you would have spent looking at your phone.

events.title: Bank error in your favor.
events.body: A clerical error credits your account by $1,200. Three weeks later, it has not been reversed.

events.title: The office closes.
events.body: An email arrives. Effective immediately. You don't know when you'll be back.

events.title: Skipping breakfast again.
events.body: You realize halfway through the standup that you haven't eaten today. Third time this week.
